race.comment: FLYING FOR FUN (3) above average mare who resumes from the good gate. Placed at Group level at Flemington in the Spring and went out a winner with a decisive victory in the LR Starlight Stakes over this track and trip on November 29. Monstered her rivals in the latest trial win and Lloyd sticks. KERGUELEN (2) unbelievable first-up winner from back in the field when he surged late to nail TONKIN over 1100m at this track in BM94 class. Meets TONKIN better at the weights and gets the right tempo again. DON'T HOPE DO (6) fast on-pace sprinter who comes back a few levels for this after fading quickly when tenth in the G1 Oakleigh Plate over 1100m at Caulfield. Fitter now and assess on the good first-up Rubiton run. KING'S SECRET (4) untapped sprinter resuming. Covered ground on the speed with a gallant neck win of the LR Canterbury Sprint over 1200m. Given the two trials and can continue where he left off. TONKIN (9) stalked the fast speed when a narrow second to KERGUELEN. Keep safe
